snippets.snippet: This is one of the best places I’ve stayed.
We enjoyed so much staying at this little hut.
I will repeat here again! Thank you

address.address1: Jl. KM Nol, Gampong Iboih, Sabang, Aceh

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.6/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.9/10 on value for money

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Children 0-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
​I specifically chose to stay away from Sabang town and picked this spot closer to Kilometer 0 because I wanted a more relaxed and quiet holiday. It was definitely the right decision. While it does mean finding food is a bit more of a challenge, the peaceful atmosphere more than makes up for it.
​The room was perfectly clean and I loved that it came with both AC and a ceiling fan, so it stayed very comfortable. The bathroom was also spotless. The best part was definitely the view as the room looks out directly onto the ocean. Waking up to that scenery was incredible.
​The owner is also incredibly kind and helpful. I arrived early and was allowed to leave my bags there before check-in time. When I eventually came back to the property, I was pleasantly surprised to find that they had already moved my bags into the room for me. It is that kind of thoughtful service that really makes a stay special.
​While this place feels like an ideal spot for a honeymoon because of the romantic and quiet setting, I found it just as perfect for a solo traveler like myself. It is a great place to just slow down and enjoy the nature. Based on what I experienced, the snorkeling right in front of the bungalows is also amazing with clear water and plenty of fish to see.
​Overall, if you are looking for a place to truly unwind in Sabang and do not mind being a bit further from the city crowds, this is the place to be. I had a wonderful time and would recommend it to anyone looking for a beautiful view and great hospitality.
comments.reviewTitle: The Perfect Seaside Escape at Apollo Bungalows

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: nothing. worth the price i paid
comments.reviewPositives: Woke up to the sound of the ocean and stunning scenery. The area is peaceful, and the host is very kind. However, this is just basic accommodation. no hot shower and no breakfast provided. The view, though, is priceless. Please consider staying here if you’re looking for peace and tranquility, but if you prefer luxury, opt for a 5-star hotel instead.
comments.reviewTitle: Wonderful stay, quiet and calm place with amazing view

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very interesting for those who want to stay right in front of the beach. And a recommendation for those who don't like crowds, this place is the right choice 😊🥰
comments.originalComment: Sangat menarik bagi yg ingin menginap langsung d depan pantai. Dan rekomendasi bagi yg tidak suka keramaian tempat ini pilihan tepat 😊🥰

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Una localización perfecta. Amabilidad del anfitrión
Acostarte y levantarte viendo el mar

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The owner is very friendly, close to the beach so you can play on the beach, highly recommended for those who want to heal, because it is very calm. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
comments.originalComment: pemilik nya sangat ramah , dekat dengan pantai jadi bisa main ke pantai, sangat recomend buat yang mau healing, karna sangat tenang⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Las vistas, salir y que esté enfrente la playa es increíble. Había aire acondicionado y ventana. Buen anfitrión

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Here you can see the sea view and i really love the vibe here. This place is far away from town and it's private place which is allowed us to relax our mind, do snorkeling too. The view here was amazing. I will repeat here again! Thank you

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Comme c'était le Ramadan, trouver de quoi se nourrir a été un problème. Le resto du resort voisin était souvent fermé le soir.
comments.reviewPositives:
La proximité de la jolie plage. La tranquillité de l'endroit.
Le fait de pouvoir faire du snorkelling très facilement.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Clean, basic room. Exactly as pictured. Only 4 rooms here so you’re guaranteed to get to know your neighbours as well as the helpful owner and his family.
Beautiful location but food options are rather limited unless you hire a scooter (available on site).
WiFi and mobile signal can be temperamental so probably not the best choice for digital nomads.
comments.reviewTitle: Inexpensive, basic, and clean. Beautiful location

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Emplacement exceptionnel 
Propriétaire très gentil 
Vaut largement le prix

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Chambre propre et simple, cadre magnifique, calme et super reposant, petite terrasse vu mer, plage qui est comme privée, il n''y'a que les touristes d' appolo et des 2 autres hébergements adjacents qui l'utilisent soit quasiment personne sur une semaine passée au mois d aout. Spot de snorkeling en face du bungalow. Le propriétaire et sa famille sont adorables, Le propriétaire renseigne sur tout ce que vs avez besoin, il fait la location des scooter à 80 000 roupie la journée. Je recommande fortement, allez y les yeux  fermés.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The view is beautiful, the place is clean, not far from the 0 kilometer marker, and the owner is friendly.
comments.originalComment: View nya indah,tempatnya bersih,nggak jauh dari 0 kilometer,trus pemiliknya ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Petit bungalow face a la plage avec un spot de snorkelling juste devant. Bien sûr le logement est simple et sobre mais pour le prix c'est génial. A droite et a gauche de la guesthouse on trouve de quoi manger. Location de scooter possible au prix classique. C'était top.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hospitality is very satisfying, and the view in front of the accommodation is very beautiful.
comments.originalComment: pelanyananya sangat memuaskan, pemandangan di depan penginapan yang sangat bagus

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Leider kein Essen vor Ort, Motorroller sehr sinnvoll zwecks Mobilität, sonst recht abgelegen (Vor u Nachtril 😄)
comments.reviewPositives: Aussicht, Nähe Strand, Schmetterlingshighway direkt vor d Tür

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Alles super - allerbester Schwede auf der Insel !!! Sehr hilfsbereit !

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Wir hatten zwei Doppelzimmer mit unserem drei kleinen Kindern. Die Zimmer sind einfach ausgestattet mit Doppelbett, Ventilator, Klimaanlage und Wasserkocher. Einfaches indonesisches aber sauberes Badezimmer. Direkt rechts und links gibt es kleine Restaurants, wenn man irgendwo hinfahren möchte, muss ein Tuk, Tuk oder Auto organisiert werden, da dort keine Taxen warten. Es ist traumhaft ruhig dort und es waren kaum andere Touristen dort. Direkt im Wasser ist ein riesiges Korallenriff mit tausenden Fischen, es ist super zum Schnorcheln. Der Gastgeber und seine Familie sind sehr nett und hilfsbereit fertig. Man kann keine europäischen Standards erwarten, deswegen ist das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis auch einfach super.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Bellissimo! Il posto é fantastico con una delle spiagge più belle dell isola davanti. Barriera corallina molto grande e tantissimi pesci. L’host e la sua famiglia sono molto simpatici e disponibili.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Bungalow essenziali, puliti e con un piccolo patio fronte mare, con una splendida vista. La posizione magnifica, sulla spiaggia dove si può fare lo snorkelling migliore dell’isola. Il proprietario è stato molto accogliente, gentile e disponibile. 
A pochi passi ci sono un paio di semplici ma ottimi ristoranti familiari.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: グーグルマップでのアクセスに苦労。道路沿いの看板が入り口。
comments.reviewPositives: ビーチフロント。静かで雰囲気が良い。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Owner dia mmg super awesome. Ramah dan mesra .. view pun sangat cantek.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
This is one of the best places I’ve stayed. The biggest pleasure is being able to sit right in front of your room with the sea directly in front of you all the time. There’s so much peace, quiet and good energy here.
For me, it’s one of the best spots on the island — definitely one of the top accommodations.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: A much larger bed cover and flatter pillows would make it perfect.
comments.reviewPositives: Location location location. Beautiful soft sand beach with turquoise water. Swim 100 m to the best house reef. Tropical fish and hard corals. Kettle in room, scooter hire, access to fridge. Family Dive centre 2 min scooter ride. ( Jom Jul Travel) highly recommend! 🐠🐠friendly and helpful staff- lovely family. Restaurant 50 m along the beach. Aircon and fan in room. Clean and comfortable.
comments.reviewTitle: Perfect accommodation with huge value for money. Paridise location.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Amazing place on a remote but stunningly beautiful beach. Perfect location to disconnect, relax and calm down...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Beautiful located on a quiet beach with a nice riff just in front and a friendly and very helpful host.
Rooms are spotless clean and Aircon.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The location was great. Physically right on the clearest of beaches. The host was really down to earth and was great chatting to him. The room itself had great aircon. It also had a kettle so I could have a nice coffee in the morning and some noodles at night. Everything was also really clean and to top it off, the weather was great.
comments.reviewTitle: I’m looking at returning to Sabang in the not too distant future with my missus and I will be staying here again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Bungalows are right on the beach, quiet place, 2 places to eat near. Excelent and helpful owner, i reccomend it. The water boiler was good, we could make coffee in the room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: private beach for sure! kind hearted owner and lovely family
comments.reviewTitle: I really enjoyed my stay at Apollo Bungalow

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Well maintained 
Really good ac
Clean
Good snorkelling on the beach outside
Quiet location

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The staff were incredibly kind and attentive , they really made us feel welcome. The place itself had so much charm, and the location couldn't have been better. It's right next to the sea. Falling asleep to the sound of the waves was an absolute gift.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: verry good view!!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The bungalow is right on the beach. There is wonderful snorkelling on the coral reef about 100 m from shore. It has a fan and aircon.  Cafe 50 m away had a delicious fruit salad. To get there I hired a scooter from the ferry port and road.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The bungalows are located right on a private beach shared by 2-3 other accommodations. The view from the room and porch are just lovely. The bed was comfy, the bathroom was nice and clean, and the location is probably the most peaceful on the island. There’s no hot water to shower but we already knew this, and given how hot and humid it can get, we didn’t ever need it either. We booked 2 nights, extended for 3 more and if we had more time, we would’ve stayed much longer. To be honest, the photos don’t do justice to how beautiful the place actually is. And last but certainly not least, the host and his wife are kind and friendly people. We learnt a lot about the island, Aceh, Achinese people and a few other interesting things from the host. We hope to be back someday and spend at least a month in this tropical paradise.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The easy access to the beach, the friendly owner & family and also the plus point, they have AC!
comments.reviewTitle: All good, thank you for the warm hospitality. Definitely will return!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Amazing stay we knew there was v few facilities around but it was amazing location host and people

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: There were very few places to get food because of Ramadan but the owner was incredibly helpful.
comments.reviewPositives: Rhe location is absolutely amazing. Feels so private.
comments.reviewTitle: This will forever be a special place in my heart.  If toy love privacy

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Best place on Pulau Weh,  directly on a great beach with opportunities to snorkel on the houserif, good food and snorkel & fishingtrips next door. Or just relax and enjoy the serenity and peace. 5 min with motorbike ( to rent at Apollo ) to Iboih if you want to go to a divingschool. A magical spot ! We had a splendid time !
comments.reviewTitle: This is THE place to be for peace on Pulau Weh !

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Beautiful view
